We can use the f_sum_column(playoffs appearances) operation to sum up all the values in the "playoffs appearances" column.

The total number of playoffs appearances from all teams can be calculated by adding all the individual appearances together. Adding the numbers from each row (1+0+0+3+4+1+0+0+0+4+0+0+1+3+0+4+0) gives us a total of 21 playoff appearances.
